conflict: Anika's unprocessed grief collides with Ravi's punishing drill tempo and refusal to discuss Maya.
consequence: Anika discovers that physical exhaustion briefly quiets intrusive grief and commits to a daily regimen that starts isolating her from childhood routines.
must_land_beats: Cold-open on predawn court routine replacing mourning rituals.
Ravi reframes discipline as love without naming fear.
Anika experiences first explicit grief-suppression through pain.
End with signed weekly training schedule on the fridge.
objective: Complete Ravi's first full dawn training block without breaking down.
